pet_notes: Faithfully preserve the dog from the reference photo: small shaggy warm golden-brown dog, floppy feathered ears, dark round eyes, broad small black nose, cream-gold muzzle, cheerful open-mouth expression and pink tongue. Keep the recognizable face and natural slightly scruffy fur.
style_notes: Polished soft 2D animated pet illustration with natural fur shapes and expressive face, not geometric, not flat clip-art, not pixel art. Compact full-body silhouette readable at 192x208.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `auto`: Infer the most appropriate pet-safe style from the user request and reference images, then keep that exact style consistent across every row. User style notes: Polished soft 2D animated pet illustration with natural fur shapes and expressive face, not geometric, not flat clip-art, not pixel art. Compact full-body silhouette readable at 192x208..
